text.title: Content That Gets Cited and New Success Metrics
text.summary: Content types that earn AI citations and the redefined success scorecard for zero-click search environments.

rule.statement: Prioritize content formats that AI systems use as citation sources: original research with current statistics, expert analysis with unique opinions, and comprehensive guides with structured data.
rule.rationale: AI systems cite sources that are authoritative, specific, and current. Generic content that aggregates existing information is replaced by the AI Overview itself; original data and analysis provides the source the AI needs to cite.

list.item: Original research and data with current statistics (cited for data points)
Expert analysis and unique opinions (cited for perspective and depth)
Comprehensive guides with structured data (cited for authoritative overview)
Official documentation and methodology (cited for definitional authority)
Trusted industry sources with earned media coverage (cited for credibility)

rule.statement: Stop tracking only sessions; add search impressions, branded query growth, AI citation rate, and on-SERP actions to the success scorecard.
rule.rationale: Session-only measurement in a zero-click environment produces false negative signals — a page generating thousands of SERP impressions with low CTR (because the AI Overview answered the query) is delivering value not captured in session data.

list.item: Search impressions and AI reach (via Google Search Console)
Branded query growth (direct intent from awareness generated in AI Overviews)
SERP feature presence (featured snippets, People Also Ask, knowledge panels)
On-SERP actions: calls, directions, bookings for local
Lead quality over quantity — zero-click drives fewer but higher-intent visits
Foundation work (schema implementation, content restructuring): 4-8 weeks

antipattern.description: Treating AI Overview appearance as a failure metric
antipattern.reason: If your content triggers an AI Overview, it means your content is authoritative enough to be cited. The goal is to be the cited source inside the Overview, not to avoid the Overview appearing entirely.
